name: Ceres Inc.
summary: Ceres Inc. engages in the advertising media business in Japan. The company offers smartphone advertising media services with point system. It provides its users with given points that can be exchanged to digital contents, such as cash, various electronic money, and games; and is involved in the operation of Moby byte, a recruitment based part-time job recruiting site. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
